2605.20061.title: Rewarding Beliefs, Not Actions: Consistency-Guided Credit Assignment for Long-Horizon Agents
2605.20061.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a promising paradigm for improving large language model (LLM) agents on long-horizon interactive tasks. However, in partially observable environments, incomplete observations cause agent beliefs to drift over time, while delayed rewards obscure the causal impact of intermediate decisions, exacerbating temporal credit assignment challenges. To address this, we propose ReBel (Reward Belief), a process-level reinforcement learning algorithm that explicitly models structured belief states to summarize interaction history and guide subsequent policy learning. ReBel introduces belief-consistency supervision, converting discrepancies between predicted beliefs and observed feedback into dense self-supervised signals without requiring external step-wise annotations or verifiers. It also employs belief-aware grouping to compare trajectories under similar belief states, yielding more robust and lower-variance advantage estimates. We evaluate ReBel on challenging long-horizon benchmarks, including ALFWorld and WebShop. ReBel improves task success by up to $20.4$ percentage points over the episode-level baseline GRPO and increases sample efficiency by $2.1\times$. These results suggest that belief-aware self-supervision is a promising direction for reliable long-horizon decision-making under partial observability. Code is available at: https://github.com/Fateyetian/Rebel.git.
2605.20061.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習從可驗證獎勵中（RLVR）是一個有前景的範式，用於改善大型語言模型（LLM）代理在長期互動任務中的表現。<lb/>然而，在部分可觀察的環境中，不完整的觀察會導致代理的信念隨時間漂移，而延遲的獎勵則模糊了中間決策的因果影響，加劇了時間信用分配的挑戰。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了ReBel（獎勵信念），這是一種過程級強化學習算法，明確建模結構化信念狀態以總結互動歷史並指導後續的政策學習。<lb/>ReBel引入了信念一致性監督，將預測信念與觀察到的反饋之間的差異轉換為密集的自我監督信號，而不需要外部的逐步註釋或驗證者。<lb/>它還採用了信念感知分組，以比較相似信念狀態下的軌跡，從而產生更穩健且變異性更低的優勢估計。<lb/>我們在具有挑戰性的長期基準上評估ReBel，包括ALFWorld和WebShop。<lb/>ReBel在任務成功率上比基於集的基準GRPO提高了最多$20.4$個百分點，並將樣本效率提高了$2.1\times$。<lb/>這些結果表明，信念感知自我監督是可靠的長期決策在部分可觀察性下的一個有前景的方向。<lb/>代碼可在以下鏈接獲得：https://github.com/Fateyetian/Rebel.git。
2605.20061.author: Wenjie Tang et.al.
2605.20061.authors: Wenjie Tang, Minne Li, Sijie Huang, Liquan Xiao, Yuan Zhou
